prompt: A highly detailed anime illustration of a teenage schoolgirl sitting on a rocky lunar surface in outer space, viewed from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle. She has very long flowing silver-white hair with two round odango buns on top and loose strands streaming dramatically to the right as if in low gravity or solar wind. Her face is obscured by a plain rectangular censor block in a muted beige-gray color, centered over the entire face. She wears a Japanese-style school uniform: a white long-sleeve blouse, a dark navy sleeveless sweater vest, a small green ribbon bow at the collar, a gray pleated skirt, white knee socks, and brown loafers. She is seated on the edge of a moon rock with one hand braced behind her and the other resting near her side, legs angled forward in a relaxed pose. The background is a deep star-filled black sky with the planet Earth glowing in the upper right, showing the Asia-Pacific region, with a soft sunbeam entering diagonally from the top right. The moon terrain is bright gray and heavily textured with craters and jagged rocks. Include exactly 3 pieces of lunar equipment: 2 metallic boxy panels or instrument cases on the left side of the foreground and midground, and 1 small rover or antenna-like device on the lower right. Lighting is cinematic and cool, with bright rim light on the hair and soft highlights on the uniform and legs. Render in polished modern anime key visual style, ultra-clean linework, luminous hair strands, subtle depth, and a wistful sci-fi mood.
